summary: Base W9 — first post-deload step-up week. Template permanently changed 6/16 (Adj #92): Hyp A Wed→Tue, threshold Tue→Wed, Thu now off. Hill-stride debut clean Mon (Adj #91). Wed 4×8 @ T ran 7:45–7:52/mi at RIR 2–3 'almost too easy' (cooler weather) with peak HR 190 = strongest run-MHR signal yet → the owed standalone fresh-day max test (1500m all-out / treadmill ramp, Adj #9/#53/#93) now rolls to W10 (Fri went to an easy run). Fri easy ran quick — 8:59/mi @ HR avg 171 / peak 183, nasal-clean (aerobic) but not truly easy: keep easy days genuinely easy on the tighter Wed→Fri spacing (Adj #96). Tendons holding clean into the step-up (Achilles/knees quiet Mon→Wed→Fri). Remaining: Sat long 60 AM + Hyp B PM (calf 335 bump released, Adj #40/#89).
